description_long: This is a modern, rectangular hostel building with four stories, featuring a flat roof partially lined with solar panels. The facade combines white, green, and pinkish brickwork, with large, grid-like windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entrance is centrally located on the white and green side, marked by double glass doors and a small canopy, flanked by symmetrical windows. The rear and side facades display a more uniform pink brick with additional windows and a few balconies with blue-tinted glass railings. The building is set on a paved lot with a few trees and minimal landscaping, suggesting an urban or campus environment. The overall design is clean and functional, with subtle decorative elements such as colored panels and modern window framing.
description: A four-story modern hostel with a flat roof, large grid windows, and a mix of white, green, and pink brick facades. Features include a central glass entrance, balconies, and solar panels.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with double glass doors, a small canopy, and a mix of white and green facade panels, flanked by symmetrical large windows and two trees.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the pink brick facade, two blue-glass balconies, and a tree on the left, with a garage-like structure and paved area visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a uniform pink brick wall with a row of large windows and green panels at the base, lacking a visible entrance or balconies.
description_view_3: The opposite side view features a prominent glassed-in section above the ground floor, more green and white panels, and a tree on the right, with no balconies visible.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is centrally located on the white and green facade, featuring double glass doors with a small, flat canopy above. The entrance is at ground level, flanked by symmetrical windows, and is accessible via a paved walkway with minimal steps or ramps visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are large, rectangular, and arranged in a grid pattern across all facades. The front and rear have symmetrical rows of windows, while the sides feature similar window arrangements with some variation for balconies and architectural features. All windows have dark frames and no visible shutters or decorative elements.
attribute_balcony_presence: Balconies are present on one side of the building, with two blue-glass balconies located on the first and second floors. They feature modern glass railings and are integrated into the pink brick facade.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with Modernist influences, characterized by clean lines, flat roof, large grid windows, and a mix of colored facade panels.
